title: Search Player
description: ✘ Shows the coordinates of the players
body:
A simple mod that will show the coordinates of the players in real time.

The mod was created because I kept losing my teammate in the single world, and it's inconvenient to ask for his coordinates all the time, and the teammate may not answer.

**The mod is activated by default with the letter "Y" in the control settings, you can change the key.**

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**
